meta.description: Handles a POST /login request: rate-limits the client, parses and validates the submitted credentials, authenticates against the user database, and on success creates a session and fires a welcome email through the external gateway. Validation or auth failures re-render the login form.

nodes.label: login_view()
nodes.description: HTTP handler for POST /login. Orchestrates the whole flow and returns either a redirect or the re-rendered form.

nodes.label: rate_limiter()
nodes.description: Sliding-window rate limit keyed by client IP; 10 attempts per minute.

nodes.label: parse_credentials()
nodes.description: Extracts username/password from the form body and normalizes the username.

nodes.label: validate_input()
nodes.description: Schema-level checks: non-empty fields, username length, password length >= 8.

nodes.label: authenticate_user()
nodes.description: Loads the user record and verifies the password hash. Returns a User or raises AuthError.

nodes.label: query_user_db()
nodes.description: SELECT on the users table by normalized username. Returns row or None.

nodes.label: verify_password()
nodes.description: Constant-time argon2id verification of the submitted password against the stored hash.

nodes.label: create_session()
nodes.description: Mints a signed session token, sets the cookie, and persists the session row.

nodes.label: session_store.put()
nodes.description: Writes the session record to Redis with a 30-day TTL.

nodes.label: send_welcome_email()
nodes.description: Queued after login succeeds; renders the template and hands off to the gateway. Runs off the request path.

nodes.label: EmailGateway.send()
nodes.description: Third-party SMTP/API provider client (Postmark). Network call with retry.

nodes.label: render_error()
nodes.description: Re-renders the login form with a flash message; the user can retry, looping back to the entry point.
